prompt: Luxurious minimalist monogram logo of letters A and M merged together. The design uses elegant thin lines forming an interlocking AM where the crossbar of the A connects with the peaks of the M. Color: deep olive green (#4A5D23) as the primary fill, with thin gold (#C9A84C) outline accents. Clean geometric construction, art deco inspired but modern. Perfectly symmetrical. Isolated on completely transparent background. Flat design, zero gradients, zero shadows. Vector-quality sharp edges. Professional brand mark suitable for a premium personal brand. Do not include any additional text, decorations, or background elements.
